sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: These are for you... It's your favourite flavour.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: Everyone in town left stuff here for me while I was gone...

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: I wrote a letter for you...

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: I wrote you a letter explaining how I feel, but now it all feels wrong.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: It's different when I'm sitting here, I have to face the fact that you're really gone.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.prompt: I haven't visited you in a month. I think I felt...

options.label: Guilty...
options.followUp: Sitting by your grave now that you're gone. I should have been there for you more while you were here.

options.label: Helpless...
options.followUp: You're gone and there is nothing I can do to change that. Everything feels so out of my control.

options.label: Angry...
options.followUp: You knew you were sick and you acted like everything was fine. I wish you took it more seriously.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.prompt: When you were still here, I wish I had...

options.label: Told you how I was feeling...
options.followUp: I always felt like I should deal with my problems on my own, you had more to deal with.

options.label: Spent more time with you...
options.followUp: I wasted the time I had left not knowing it would be gone.

options.label: Read the letters you sent...
options.followUp: I could've done something or at least given you what you asked for.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.prompt: It took a long time for me to get the courage to go back to the town again. I was worried that they...

options.label: Would blame me...
options.followUp: I left for so long. I wasn't there to help you and I wasn't there to help them move on.

options.label: Would pity me...
options.followUp: I don't need that. I don't want people to look at me differently.

options.label: Would move on...
options.followUp: I felt so stuck. I couldn't face the change. It hurt to see the town without you.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.prompt: When I finally went outside, the town...

options.label: Wasn't very supportive...
options.followUp: It felt like they blamed me for everything falling apart. What was I supposed to do anyway?

options.label: Tried to support me...
options.followUp: They pushed me to keep going, I don't think I would have gotten the courage to visit without them.

options.label: Supported me where they could...
options.followUp: They talked to me like everything was normal, they even left me some stuff by your grave.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.prompt: I need to figure out how to live without you. I think the only way I can do that is by...

options.label: Connecting more with the community...
options.followUp: I'm going to try and move on in your absence. I've learned that life keeps moving even when I can't, and I want to be there for people.

options.label: Moving somewhere and keep living...
options.followUp: I need to get out of here. I don't think I can move past anything, living in that house and living without you feels so lonely.

options.label: Taking more time to reflect...
options.followUp: Everything feels like too much, I just want to sleep. I feel like everyone's relying on me and I don't know what to do.
